testcase.name: test_login_creates_audit_log

failure.message: AssertionError: No audit log found for partner login assert None is not None

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter106_partner_signup_signin.py:720: in test_login_creates_audit_log assert audit is not None, "No audit log found for partner login" E AssertionError: No audit log found for partner login E assert None is not None

testcase.name: test_brute_force_lockout
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter106_partner_signup_signin.py:747: in test_brute_force_lockout assert resp.status_code == 401, \ E AssertionError: Attempt 1: Expected 401, got 429: {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down and try again."} E assert 429 == 401 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_shared_email_logs_into_tenant_a
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter106_partner_signup_signin.py:783: in test_shared_email_logs_into_tenant_a assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 for Tenant A login, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 for Tenant A login, got 429: {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down and try again."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_shared_email_logs_into_tenant_b
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter106_partner_signup_signin.py:796: in test_shared_email_logs_into_tenant_b assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 for Tenant B login, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 for Tenant B login, got 429: {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down and try again."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_tenant_a_code_with_tenant_b_user_fails
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter106_partner_signup_signin.py:812: in test_tenant_a_code_with_tenant_b_user_fails assert resp.status_code == 401, \ E AssertionError: Expected 401 (user not in Tenant A), got 429: {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down and try again."} E assert 429 == 401 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_correct_credentials_wrong_slug_fails
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter106_partner_signup_signin.py:831: in test_correct_credentials_wrong_slug_fails assert resp.status_code == 400, \ E AssertionError: Expected 400 (invalid partner code), got 429: {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down and try again."} E assert 429 == 400 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_correct_slug_wrong_password_generic_error
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter106_partner_signup_signin.py:842: in test_correct_slug_wrong_password_generic_error assert resp.status_code == 401, f"Expected 401, got {resp.status_code}: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Expected 401, got 429: {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down and try again."} E assert 429 == 401 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_inactive_tenant_blocks_login
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter106_partner_signup_signin.py:863: in test_inactive_tenant_blocks_login assert resp.status_code == 403, \ E AssertionError: Expected 403 for inactive tenant, got 429: {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down and try again."} E assert 429 == 403 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_inactive_user_blocked
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter106_partner_signup_signin.py:900: in test_inactive_user_blocked assert login_resp.status_code == 403, \ E AssertionError: Expected 403 for inactive user, got 429: {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down and try again."} E assert 429 == 403 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_tenant_a_cannot_access_admin_tenants
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_iter106_partner_signup_signin.py:249: in tenant_a_headers assert resp.status_code == 200, f"Tenant A login failed: {resp.text}" E AssertionError: Tenant A login failed: {"detail": "Rate limit exceeded. Please slow down and try again."} E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.name: test_reset_password_with_valid_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Expected 200 after password reset, got 429 assert 429 == 200 + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_iter106_partner_signup_signin.py:1067: in test_reset_password_with_valid_code assert login_resp.status_code == 200, f"Expected 200 after password reset, got {login_resp.status_code}" E AssertionError: Expected 200 after password reset, got 429 E assert 429 == 200 E + where 429 = <Response [429]>.status_code
